text.text:
### Images from Nature

These images are copyright for Nature and allowed to be used according to the license determined by them.

To visualize all images, use the left and right arrows on the slide below.

1 / 1
Mitochondrial DNA haplogroup composition of the 44 sewage samples with an average coverage of 10 or higher. (a) Mitochondrial DNA haplogroup composition of samples plotted at the site of the wastewater collection. Circle colors and colors of the pie charts correspond to specifc haplogroups, while colors of the underscores indicate the four broad biogeographic ancestry categories. (b) Mitochondrial DNA haplogroup composition of samples using only the four broad biogeographic ancestry categories. Shared under Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0) license. © Dr. Anna Pipek Orsolya et al and Nature (Nature Open Access).

### Image Descriptions
- **Slide 1 / 1**: Mitochondrial DNA haplogroup composition of the 44 sewage samples with an average coverage of 10 or higher. (a) Mitochondrial DNA haplogroup composition of samples plotted at the site of the wastewater collection. Circle colors and colors of the pie charts correspond to specifc haplogroups, while colors of the underscores indicate the four broad biogeographic ancestry categories. (b) Mitochondrial DNA haplogroup composition of samples using only the four broad biogeographic ancestry categories. Shared under Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0) license. © Dr. Anna Pipek Orsolya *et al* and Nature (*Nature Open Access*).
